name: OpenFarm
description: An open-source management platform for large-scale 3D printer farms.
achievements: Managing large-scale 3D printer farms for the University of Utah Marriott Library empowering 10s of thousands of students, facuilty, and researchers.
Freed print administrators time 7+ hours/week via automated G-code validation, payment marking API, and automatic communications, including local RAG LLM-assisted email drafting.
Eliminated unpaid print starts by driving payment compliance to 0% unpaid jobs (previously jobs could start before payment), resolving a critical operational issue for the University of Utah.
